name: Modern Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the marinade, combine chili powder, minced garlic, cocoa powder, cayenne pepper, salt, tomato paste, and tequila in a blender or food processor. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the marinade over the flank steak and mix well to coat the steak evenly. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
3. Light the grill and allow the coals to turn white hot.
4. Carefully place the marinated steak on the grill and cook to your desired doneness.
5. Place the grilled steak on a cutting board and slice diagonally across the grain into strips that are about 1/2-inch thick.
6. Warm the tortillas on the grill, turning once. Once warmed, place them in a covered bowl to stay warm.
7. Arrange the sliced meat in a serving dish. Serve with guacamole, chopped tomatoes, salsa, onions, refried beans, and cilantro.
